mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_visit_photo ( supplier_id, staff_photo, sample_room_photo, production_workshop_photo, packaging_workshop_photo, inspection_area_photo, factory_area_photo, gate_photo, other_photo, remark, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{supplierId}, #{staffPhoto}, #{sampleRoomPhoto}, #{productionWorkshopPhoto}, #{packagingWorkshopPhoto}, #{inspectionAreaPhoto}, #{factoryAreaPhoto}, #{gatePhoto}, #{otherPhoto}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM supplier_visit_photo WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_id, staff_photo, sample_room_photo, production_workshop_photo, packaging_workshop_photo, inspection_area_photo, factory_area_photo, gate_photo, other_photo, remark, created_by, created_at FROM supplier_visit_photo WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, supplier_id, staff_photo, sample_room_photo, production_workshop_photo, packaging_workshop_photo, inspection_area_photo, factory_area_photo, gate_photo, other_photo, remark, created_by, created_at FROM supplier_visit_photo WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
